proposed_domain: Etruscan buon-fresco preservation (pigment applied to wet lime plaster; CO2 carbonation reaction over hours-to-days converts Ca(OH)2 to CaCO3 trapping pigment in crystalline matrix; only commits during open carbonation window)

closest_prior_match.verdict: DISTINCT — bentwood is mechanical fold; fresco is chemical carbonation with time-bounded write window. Different mechanism class.
